summary: Iteration 119 - Logo System Rebuild + Bug Fixes + Fine Art Commission Form. All 8 tasks verified via grep commands and browser testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 tasks verified. Login uses window.location.href for full page reload. Lazy loading produces 18+ separate chunks.

TASK_1_KolorLogo_reverse_K_polygons.details: KolorLogo.tsx contains reverse K polygons with 3 tonal planes: stem #2D1470, mid #6C2EDB, blade #9B6AEF. Amber accent #E8891A present. grep '#2D1470' returns line 31, grep '#E8891A' returns lines 31, 33.

TASK_1_KolorLogo_variants_and_iconMode.details: KolorLogo.tsx supports variants: 'light', 'dark', 'purple' (line 4). iconMode prop exists (line 7). All variants have proper color mappings (lines 29-34).

TASK_2_Dashboard_sidebar_logo.details: Dashboard.tsx sidebar uses <KolorLogo> component (line 407-408). data-testid='sidebar-logo' exists (line 405). No 'KOLOR' gradient text. Browser test confirmed sidebar-logo found.

TASK_2_Dashboard_mobile_header_logo.details: Dashboard.tsx mobile header uses <KolorLogo> (line 535). data-testid='header-logo-link' exists (line 533). No Sparkle icon.

TASK_2_Dashboard_mobile_menu_logo.details: Dashboard.tsx mobile slide-out menu uses <KolorLogo> (line 603). No 'KOLOR STUDIO' gradient text.

TASK_2_Sparkle_import_removed.details: grep 'Sparkle' in Dashboard.tsx and Calendar.tsx returns 'No Sparkle imports found'. Unused import removed.

TASK_3_Calendar_header_logo.details: Calendar.tsx header uses <KolorLogo> (line 209). data-testid='calendar-back-to-dashboard' exists (line 207). No Sparkle icon. Browser test confirmed calendar-back-to-dashboard found.

TASK_4_Login_window_location_href.details: Login.tsx handleSubmit uses window.location.href = '/dashboard' (line 60). NOT navigate('/dashboard'). Browser test confirmed login redirects to /dashboard successfully.

TASK_5_PublicPortfolio_studioDisplayName.details: PublicPortfolio.tsx prefers firstName+lastName construction (line 46): 'userInfo?.firstName && userInfo?.lastName'. Browser test shows 'KOLOR STUDIO' displayed correctly.

TASK_5_PublicPortfolio_speciality_stylin.details: PublicPortfolio.tsx speciality uses uppercase, 13px, #9CA3AF styling (line 233). data-testid='portfolio-speciality' exists (line 236).

TASK_5_PublicPortfolio_no_explore_text.details: grep 'Explore our creative work' returns 'Text not found - GOOD'. Browser test confirmed text not present.

TASK_6_portal_no_sendAutoResponseEmail.details: grep 'sendAutoResponseEmail' in portal.ts returns 'No sendAutoResponseEmail found'. Duplicate email removed.

TASK_6_portal_still_sends_notifications.details: portal.ts still calls sendNewLeadNotification (line 773, 775) and sendInquiryAcknowledgementEmail (line 781, 782).

TASK_7_AddLeadModal_commission_panel_hea.details: AddLeadModal.tsx shows 'Fine Art Commission Details' when serviceType is FINE_ART (line 425).

TASK_7_AddLeadModal_medium_placeholder.details: AddLeadModal.tsx medium field shows adapted placeholder for FINE_ART: 'Oil on canvas, watercolour, bronze...' (line 441).

TASK_8_App_lazy_imports.details: App.tsx uses React.lazy() for all page imports. grep 'lazy(() => import' returns 18 matches (lines 4-21).

TASK_8_App_Suspense_wrapper.details: App.tsx wraps Routes in <Suspense> with loading spinner fallback (lines 52-56).

TASK_8_build_separate_chunks.details: yarn build shows multiple separate chunks: Login-ClPvlVAB.js, Calendar-EcwnRvYA.js, Dashboard-dSuWaHMt.js, PublicPortfolio-AfVJHcu4.js, etc. Not one monolithic bundle.

login_flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 successful, redirects to /dashboard via window.location.href.

data_testids_exist.details: All required data-testids verified: sidebar-logo, header-logo-link, calendar-back-to-dashboard, portfolio-speciality, portfolio-hero-title.
